description: Hardest case: 6 alerts from 2 simultaneous but unrelated outages (CPU spike on one host, DB failure on another). Should form exactly 2 clusters.

alerts.text: CPU at 98% on app-server-1. Python data processing job consuming all cores. Load average 14.2. Response times degraded for users on this node.
High CPU utilisation on app-server-1: user-space CPU 91%, kernel 7%. Top process: python3 pid 4421 cpu=87%. System unresponsive.
Thermal throttling detected on app-server-1. CPU frequency reduced from 3.4GHz to 1.8GHz. Core temperature 94C. Fan speed maxed.
MySQL replication lag 847 seconds on replica db-replica-2. Binary log position falling behind. Write-heavy workload on primary.
Database failover initiated: primary db-primary-1 unreachable. Replica db-replica-2 being promoted. Connection strings need update.
Application returning stale data: cache miss rate 100%, falling back to DB replica. Replica lag causing read-your-writes violations.
